top_signals.title: Iran war tightens ‘super-squeeze’ in metals markets
top_signals.summary: Copper and aluminium had been rallying before Middle East conflict hit supply
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CVC’s Lucas Says AI Impact on PE Portfolios Can’t Be Overstated
top_signals.summary: The importance of artificial intelligence for private equity portfolios can’t be overemphasized as managers look to prepare businesses they own for rampant technological change, according to CVC Capital Partners Plc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ChinaAMC on North Asia Allocations
top_signals.summary: Yimei Li, CEO, China Asset Management Company tells Bloomberg’s Minmin Low interest in China onshore markets from international investors is still more on the transactional side, with long time allocators not fully back yet. Li was speaking at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
